title: mirabilis jalapa f. eujalapa
intro: Mirabilis jalapa f. eujalapa is a variety of the four o'clock flower, a type of flowering plant native to the Americas. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mirabilis jalapa f. eujalapa include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
